title: Tnt Arrow Counter
description: A mod that makes it so you can't get railgunned or trapped, shows the amount of arrows and tnt minecarts in your render distance, can either be in the top left of your screen, or you can bind it so you only see it when keybind is held
body: A mod that makes it so you can't get railgunned or trapped, shows the amount of arrows and tnt minecarts in your render distance, can either be in the top left of your screen, or you can bind it so you only see it when keybind is held
